title: From A to B
description:
You are given two integers, a and b. You want to transform a into b by performing a sequence of operations. You can only perform the following operations:

  • Divide a by two (but only if a is even)
  • Add one to a

What is the minimum number of operations you need to transform a into b?
input: The single line of input contains two space-separated integers a and b (1 ≤ a, b ≤ 109)
output: Output a single integer, which is the minimum number of the given operations needed to transform a into b.
source: ICPC, Regionals, North America, Southeast USA Regional, 2019 Southeast USA Regional Programming Contest, Division 2, ICPC, Regionals, North America, Pacific Northwest Regional, 2019 ICPC Pacific Northwest Region, Division 1, ICPC, Regionals, North America, Pacific Northwest Regional, 2019 ICPC Pacific Northwest Region, Division 2
